response:
VERDICT: TAMPERED  
ROUND: 47  
REASONING: when I recomputed round-47 from the values that come into the round (those shown on L0727) I already get a discrepancy on the very first “small” value:
• e = 1011 0001 0000 0101 1111 1111 1011 1110  
  – ROTR(e,6)⊕ROTR(e,11)⊕ROTR(e,25) must be 1000 1111 1010 0101 1111 1000 0001 1001  
  – The trace (L0728) has 1000 1111 1110 1101 1110 1000 0001 1001  
             ^^^^                                           (bit 17 differs)  
Since this is already wrong, every quantity that depends on S1 from there on – ch (L0729), step1 (L0730), … all the way to the end of the compression – is necessarily different from the genuine algorithm, yet the trace continues consistently with that altered bit.  
All rounds before 47 match the algorithm (I repeated the same check up through round 46, e.g. S1 on L0714, L0701, etc.), so the single-bit tamper occurred inside round 47.
